title: senecio lasiocaulon
intro: Senecio lasiocaulon, also known as the rough-stemmed groundsel, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family that is native to Australia. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Senecio lasiocaulon include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat skin conditions such as eczema and acne. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea or tincture, and it is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
